title: chrysopsis floridana
intro: Chrysopsis floridana, also known as the Green Ray or Green-ray Chrysopsis, is a shrub native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chrysopsis floridana include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves or roots in water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or salves for topical use.
